calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Real Property Held By Trustee In Trust
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carlos Alvarez, via ZOOM, for Wendy Hobson, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that it is not inclined to grant this petition. Counsel provides advocacy on behalf of his petition. The court advises counsel that there is not enough evidence to grant the petition and it is denied in open court.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.
